quality_highlights: network-configuration.md - excellent troubleshooting section with log output and inline remediation arrows
smoke-workflow-call.md - consistent emoji conventions and contextual status messages

single_file_improvements.issue: Security Best Practices tips 1 and 4 conflict: 'Start minimal' vs 'Start with defaults'. Users may omit required defaults ecosystem.
run-failure uses warning emoji (warning) instead of failure emoji (red X), inconsistent with other workflows like smoke-workflow-call
